title: Model Availability
description: Information about a model's availability both locally and in remote repositories
documentation:
## Purpose
Answers whether a given model is present on the local filesystem and whether it exists in its source repository. This is the lightweight check a cap can perform before deciding whether to download, load, or surface a model to the user.

## When to use
Use this type as the output of an availability-check cap when you need a simple yes/no answer before committing to a full download or load operation. For richer per-file inventory use [Model Contents](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-contents;textable;record); for download progress use [Model Status](https://capdag.com/browse/media:model-status;textable;record).

## Notes
`local_available` and `remote_available` are both required. The `local_path` and `size_bytes` fields are optional and populated only when the model is locally present. The `last_modified` timestamp follows ISO 8601 and reflects the local file's modification time.

model_spec.description: The model specification that was checked

local_available.description: Whether the model is available locally

remote_available.description: Whether the model is available in the remote repository

local_path.description: Local filesystem path if available locally

last_modified.description: Last modification time if available locally (ISO 8601)
